mapper.select: SELECT * FROM domain_component WHERE component_id = #{deviceTypeId} AND domain_id = #{domainId} AND component_type = 'devicetype'
SELECT * FROM domain_component WHERE component_id = #{deviceTypeId} AND component_type = 'devicetype'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO domain_component (domain_id, component_id, component_type) VALUES
(#{domainId}, #{deviceTypeId}, 'devicetype')
